ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meps" (
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MEP */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the MEP */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the MEP */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the MEP */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the MEP represents */,
  "constituency" TEXT /* Constituency the MEP represents */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the MEP's term began */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the MEP's term ends */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MEP's political party */,
  "epg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MEP's European Parliamentary Group (EPG) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the MEP */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the MEP's official photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the MEP's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meps_epg_id FOREIGN KEY ("epg_id") REFERENCES epgs ("epg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meps_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the party is based */,
  "foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current party leader */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epgs" (
  "epg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EPG */,
  "epg_name" TEXT /* Name of the European Parliamentary Group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the EPG's political orientation */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date when the EPG was formed */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current EPG leader */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the EPG */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the EPG */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the EPG's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MEP who cast the vote */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being voted on */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., 'For', 'Against', 'Abstain') */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vote */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Overall result of the vote (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "vote_session" TEXT /* Session in which the vote took place */,
  "vote_location" TEXT /* Location where the vote took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_mep_id FOREIGN KEY ("mep_id") REFERENCES meps ("mep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., 'Yes/No', 'Multiple Choice') */,
  "proposal_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was proposed */,
  "proposer" TEXT /* Name of the person or group who proposed the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., pending, passed, rejected) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., environment, economy, health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote count */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of votes for this type */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of MEPs who voted */,
  "abstention_count" INTEGER /* Count of abstentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_counts_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_votes" (
  "party_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party vote count */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of votes for this type by the party */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of MEPs from the party who voted */,
  "abstention_count" INTEGER /* Count of abstentions from the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_votes_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_votes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epg_votes" (
  "epg_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EPG vote count */,
  "epg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the European Parliamentary Group */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of votes for this type by the EPG */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of MEPs from the EPG who voted */,
  "abstention_count" INTEGER /* Count of abstentions from the EPG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epg_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epg_votes_epg_id FOREIGN KEY ("epg_id") REFERENCES epgs ("epg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epg_votes_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MEP whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_mep_id FOREIGN KEY ("mep_id") REFERENCES meps ("mep_id")
)
